name: io.github.kunwarmahen/smritikosh
description: Store, recall, and inject persistent user memory from a self-hosted Smritikosh memory server.

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: install the package with the MCP extra

environmentVariables.name: SMRITIKOSH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (sk-smriti-…), sent as a Bearer token; store_memory needs the write scope

environmentVariables.name: SMRITIKOSH_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default user whose memory the tools act on

environmentVariables.name: SMRITIKOSH_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the running Smritikosh server

environmentVariables.name: SMRITIKOSH_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: App namespace; must be in the key's app_ids
